mapper.select: SELECT id, novel_id, chapter_num, title, word_count, view_count, create_time FROM chapter WHERE novel_id = #{novelId} ORDER BY chapter_num ASC
SELECT * FROM chapter WHERE novel_id = #{novelId} AND chapter_num = #{chapterNum}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chapter WHERE novel_id = #{novelId}
SELECT * FROM chapter WHERE novel_id = #{novelId} AND chapter_num < #{chapterNum} ORDER BY chapter_num DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM chapter WHERE novel_id = #{novelId} AND chapter_num > #{chapterNum} ORDER BY chapter_num ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE chapter SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chapter (novel_id, chapter_num, title, content, word_count) VALUES (#{novelId}, #{chapterNum}, #{title}, #{content}, #{wordCount})
